CustomField.description: PSS Polygon record holding the GeoJSON/KML project boundary geometry for this NEPA project. Parent record for associated GIS Data Element records (nepa_gis_data_element__c). Supports MFR #6 (Integrated GIS Analysis Tools).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Project boundary polygon (PSS Polygon object). Links to GIS Data Element records for spatial datasets.
CustomField.label: Project Boundary Polygon
